title: Lesson 64
paragraph: This lesson focuses on practical B1 vocabulary for everyday communication.

words.meaning: a short piece of music with words
words.example: This song is easy to sing.

words.meaning: a game or activity using physical skill
a road in a town or city with buildings beside it
words.example: The street is busy at lunchtime.

words.meaning: a person who studies at a school or college
words.example: Each student must bring a pencil.

words.meaning: a place where people live, smaller than a city
words.example: Our town has a small station.

words.meaning: a tall plant with a trunk and branches
words.example: A big tree stands near the gate.

words.meaning: a very small town in the countryside
words.example: The village is quiet in winter.

words.meaning: an opening in a wall or vehicle with glass
words.example: Open the window for fresh air.

words.meaning: the earth and all its people and places
words.example: People around the world use the internet.
